title: Request minimum permission at the moment of intent
summary: Permission requests explain an immediate benefit, ask for the narrowest scope, and support denial, limitation, revocation, and recovery.
guidance: Preserve unrelated functionality and never use shame, obstruction, repeated nagging, or misleading pre-prompts to manufacture consent.
do: Explain what, why, duration, and data destination
Design denied and revoked states as normal paths
dont: Request speculative access on launch or punish refusal
verification: permission lifecycle and coercion review across all scopes
